api_key.description: Granola public API key (grn_ prefix), sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>; never logged.

base_url.description: Granola public API base URL override, for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound applied as the notes stream's created_after filter on a fresh sync; superseded by the persisted incremental cursor on repeat syncs.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
